title: calycobolus lanulosus
intro: Calycobolus lanulosus, also known as the hairy calycobolus, is a plant species within the family Convolvulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and various other health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, making it a potential natural remedy for pain relief and temperature regulation. Calycobolus lanulosus can be prepared into herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
